3226500.name: 我委托了一些青蛙 演示版
3226500.description:
This contains just 1 level from the full game. Your progress will seamlessly transfer if you purchase the full game.

The brief was simple. I commissioned artists to create a fantasy world, and hide as many frogs and flies as they can inside it. Now it’s your job to find them all!

Key features

🖼️ 1 level from the original: 🐸 50+ frogs, 🪰 50+ flies
🔄 Automatic save sync between the full version and the demo
💡 ∞ Unlimited hints if you get stuck
🎵 Background music for the level
💾 3x save slots
♻️ Restore a small number of hidden objects to a painting so you can find them again!
🗑️ Reset progress entirely and play again
🕒 Timer included to show how long you took to complete each level

Cheats

If the flies upset you, you can remove all the flies from the level by holding the keys F, L and Y together, in that order.

Replayable

You can restore a small number of hidden objects back into a painting so you can find them again! It’s much harder when there are only a few hidden objects left (especially randomly). You can also use up to 3 save slots so you can replay without progress loss. Alternatively, you can reset your progress for the entire game if you’d like to start over.
